incentive.statement: Preserve Andrews authority and complete behavioral proof while reducing delivery and verification to one modern ESM runtime.

coordinator.responsibility: Observe migration deviations, add temporary support without transferring primary responsibility, and close every obsolete classic path.

outcome: Lessons after 22 extend one canonical ESM application without generated classic mirrors, ordered script tags, or duplicated runtime suites.

responsibilities.statement: Deliver every authorized grammar capability through one declared modern ESM installer graph.

actors.contribution: Own the canonical module graph, installation order, application bootstrap, and fail-closed capability checks.

actors.triggerFinding: Correct cross-runtime parity work was multiplying source files, ordered globals, tests, and maintenance actions.
actors.contribution: Promote verified modules to canonical sources and remove the superseded classic delivery lane.
actors.alignmentEvidence: One index module, one installer manifest, zero generated-wrapper headers, and zero production classic sources.
actors.exitCondition: The modern runtime passes full, audit, manifest, and live-browser proof without a compatibility lane.

responsibilities.statement: Prove the single modern runtime and the grammar contracts it installs without rebuilding a second runtime.

actors.contribution: Own ESM tests, audits, manifest checks, readiness gates, and live-browser smoke proof.

actors.triggerFinding: Maintenance scripts still depended on synchronous classic VM loading after the browser cutover.
actors.contribution: Move script callers onto the same module harness used by the authoritative test runtime.
actors.alignmentEvidence: Repository scans find no runtime consumers of deleted classic source paths.
actors.exitCondition: All readiness and maintenance commands execute through ESM imports.

responsibilities.statement: Keep policy, baseline metrics, current target, and closure evidence consistent with the approved modern-browser scope.

actors.contribution: Own scope, actor assignments, deviation gates, documentation, and final closure.

retirements.removalEvidence: The 72 superseded classic runtime sources, ordered classic entry, alternate HTML entry, and classic VM execution lane are removed; the public page and all verification use the canonical ESM installer graph.
All generated-wrapper headers are gone; the three wrapper-generation files and wrapper-parity test are removed; canonical modules are tested directly.

evidence.result: Removed all 72 approved classic runtime sources and all 3 approved wrapper-generation files; their verified .mjs counterparts are canonical.
Runtime manifest alignment passes with 1 browser entry, 72 canonical modules, and 72 fail-closed installers.
The canonical ESM runtime passes 3327 of 3327 tests across 53 suites.
Lesson 20 passes every authority matrix, and the Lessons 20-22 Canvas audit passes all 39 formulas with 22 of 22 engine-derived nonactive matches and zero mismatches.

Headless Chrome loads one module and zero classic scripts in direct-import mode; passive chihua is authorized as #ni-0(chihua-lo)0+0-0# with typed-frame authority true and formula-string authority false.
The in-app browser loads one module and zero classic scripts, visibly authorizes passive chihua as #ti-0(chīhua-lō)0+c-0# / Tichīhualōc., and emits no warning or error.
